title: Sqlitelogictest: IN operator return a single column
poc: CREATE TABLE tab2(col0 INTEGER, col1 INTEGER, col2 INTEGER);
SELECT ALL * FROM tab2 WHERE + col0 IN ( - 12, col0, - col1, col1 / + col0, col1 );
key_bug_features: IN operator with complex expressions in WHERE clause
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tab3(col0 INTEGER, col1 VARCHAR(50), col2 FLOAT, col3 BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO tab3 VALUES (10, 'test1', 1.5, TRUE), (20, 'test2', 2.5, FALSE), (30, 'test3', NULL, TRUE);
SELECT * FROM tab3 WHERE col0 IN (SELECT col0 FROM tab3 WHERE col3 IS TRUE);
CREATE TABLE tab4(col0 INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, col1 DATE NOT NULL);
